negative_calibration.purpose: teach what not to reinforce as success patterns

clarify_relabel_guard.purpose: catch path/url, missing-target, and underspecified cases before respond fallback

weak_question_suffix_guard.purpose: route weak '??????' style prompts by context instead of suffix alone

critical_constraints_review.purpose: improve critical signals, operations, constraints, and risk without sealed text

nonsealed_regression.purpose: keep old accumulation misses as regression targets

puzzle_failure_memory.purpose: record puzzle solve failures as guard actions, not success labels
